curtain.invitation: You are cordially invited to celebrate the wedding of
curtain.subtitle: We would like to invite you to celebrate with us the most special day of our lives. It would be an honor to have you present at this important moment.

reveal.heading: Reveal
reveal.scratchHint: Scratch all three circles to continue

venue.celebrationAt: The celebration will take place at
venue.name: Wooden Fairies
venue.address1: Windfield Court, No.7 Wang Kong Tsuen

dresscode.title: Dress Code
dresscode.description: We kindly request guests wear Formal Garden Party attire on our special day.

transport.title: Transport
transport.description: We have organized shuttle buses from central to the venue so you can enjoy the celebration without worries.
transport.departurePoint: Shun Tak Centre Near Taxi Station
transport.note: New Territories pick up location TBC
transport.encourage: Hop on and enjoy the ride!

rsvp.info: Please RSVP by 1 August so we can get a proper headcount
rsvp.title: Confirm your attendance
rsvp.transportYes: YES, I'm coming with shuttle bus

qa.title: Q&A
qa.deadlineA: Please RSVP by 1 August so we can get a proper headcount. :)
qa.childrenA: We adore your little ones, but the ceremony and reception are for adults only.
qa.parkingA: There's plenty of free parking near the venue entrance.

thankyou.title: Thank You
thankyou.message: For joining us on this special day. Your presence is the best gift we could receive.
